description: DeepAgents ACP Application Agent Template — development environment for building scenario-specific AI agents integrated with nuwaclaw

protected.description: Infrastructure code — runtime engine (platform client, config loader, MCP) and runnable surfaces (ACP server, CLI entry). Do not modify unless explicitly instructed.

ai-editable.description: Business logic, prompts, and skills. AI and user can freely modify.

user-editable.description: Configuration files. User and platform manage these.

acceptance.description: All acceptance commands must pass before the agent is considered ready for distribution.

constraints.promptSourceDescription: Target agent prompts come ONLY from ACP session metadata. Never hardcode in runtime.
constraints.toolPriorityDescription: When the AI needs a tool: check platform plugins first, then built-in tools, then write custom code as last resort.
constraints.variableCreationDescription: When a custom tool needs external credentials, create an agent variable. User fills value via platform UI.
constraints.mcpMergeDescription: MCP config priority: session overrides > platform MCPs > default MCPs.
